source: Ownership composition is an illustrative pattern consistent with billionaire wealth surveys (e.g. Forbes, UBS Billionaire Ambitions Report) showing equity ownership dominates large fortunes. Inheritance share is an approximate, order-of-magnitude figure informed by research on aggregate inherited wealth shares in rich economies (e.g. Piketty & Zucman, and related work compiled in the World Inequality Report) — treat as illustrative, not a precise global statistic.
inheritanceNote: Approximate share of aggregate private wealth in several rich economies traced to inheritance rather than lifetime saving, illustrative order of magnitude for recent decades.
